summary: Successfully tested all features: Enhanced Cast System (stars, fame, experience), Expanded Locations (60+), and Marketplace (level 15 lock). All 21 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: All locations have cost_per_day field
Backend: Locations have categories (studios, urban, nature, historical, beach, industrial, exotic)
Backend: GET /api/actors returns actors with stars (1-5), fame_category, years_active, cost_per_film
Backend: GET /api/directors returns directors with enhanced attributes
Backend: GET /api/screenwriters returns screenwriters with enhanced attributes
Backend: GET /api/marketplace returns 200 with can_trade, required_level=15, current_level
Backend: Marketplace properly shows level lock for users below level 15
Backend: GET /api/marketplace/my-listings returns user's listings and offers
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/list returns 403 for users below level 15
Backend: GET /api/infrastructure/{id}/valuation returns 404 for non-existent infrastructure
Frontend: Marketplace page shows 'MARKETPLACE BLOCCATO' message for users below level 15
Frontend: Marketplace shows 'Richiesto Lv.15 (Attuale: Lv.0)' badge
Frontend: Film wizard displays 60 locations with cost_per_day
Frontend: PersonCard shows star ratings (yellow stars) for actors/directors/screenwriters
Frontend: PersonCard shows fame badges (Conosciuto, Famoso, Emergente, etc.)
Frontend: PersonCard shows years of experience (e.g., '6 anni exp')
Frontend: PersonCard shows cost based on fame/stars/experience
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user (Level 0, $10M funds)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Enhanced Cast System: Actors/Directors/Screenwriters now display stars (1-5), fame badges (Sconosciuto/Conosciuto/Emergente/Famoso/Superstar), years of experience, and costs calculated based on these factors. 2) Expanded Locations: 60 filming locations available with cost_per_day, organized by category (studios, urban, nature, historical, beach, industrial, exotic). 3) Marketplace: Fully implemented with level 15 requirement - users below level 15 see 'MARKETPLACE BLOCCATO' message. Test user testcast@test.com is Level 0.

enhanced_cast_system.details: Stars (1-5), fame badges, years experience, cost calculation all working for actors, directors, screenwriters

expanded_locations.details: 60 locations with cost_per_day, 7 categories: studios, urban, nature, historical, beach, industrial, exotic

film_creation_wizard.details: Wizard correctly displays enhanced cast attributes and expanded locations
